pageContext.name: Official Sonic the Hedgehog 30th Anniversary
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Numskull invite you to celebrate more than 30 years of the world's most iconic blue blur, Sonic the Hedgehog as we bring you this super exclusive Official Sonic the Hedgehog 30th Anniversary Statue!  Boasting an action packed scene of Dr. Eggman and Sonic in the midst of an intense fight, this statue stands at a mighty 9 tall and comes with high-level details.  If you're a huge Sonic fan, this is one collectible you definitely don't want to miss out on!
